name: 03_cand_4_us500_pullback_trend_m15
hypothesis: On US500 M15, during US cash session (13:30-20:00 UTC) in an uptrending regime (EMA20>EMA50 and ADX>18), shallow RSI pullbacks to 35-45 followed by reclaim of EMA20 offer high-quality long continuation entries; symmetric logic for downtrends.

entry_rules.long: ema_fast > ema_slow AND rsi dipped below 42 within last 5 bars AND current bar closes back above ema_fast AND close > prior bar high
entry_rules.short: ema_fast < ema_slow AND rsi rose above 58 within last 5 bars AND current bar closes back below ema_fast AND close < prior bar low

exit_rules.time_stop: Close after 20 bars (~5h) if neither hit
exit_rules.breakeven: Move SL to entry after +1.25 ATR in favor
exit_rules.partial_exit: Take 50% off at +1.5 ATR, trail remainder with ema_fast
